sections.context: The L5 uplift mission has now ported the toolkit (Milestone 0) and uplifted the five sub-repos (canopy, plot, mulch, seeds, burrow) to Level 5. The final milestone seals the os-eco META repo itself: it has no package.json, no test suite, no lint pipeline, and ships no code — but the auditor still inspects governance hygiene (AGENTS.md, .gitignore, .github/ scaffolding, label taxonomy, toolkit discoverability) at the root. Currently the root has minimal .github/ (only auto-merge.yml + an EMPTY ISSUE_TEMPLATE directory), no AGENTS.md, no dependabot.yml, no labels.yml, no sync-labels workflow, and a thin .gitignore. This feature closes those gaps so the final /readiness-report can declare the meta-repo at Level 5, completing VAL-OS-ECO-001..007 + FINAL and feeding the cross-area VAL-CROSS-001..006 invariants.
sections.approach: Close the four governance/discoverability gaps for the os-eco META repo (no sub-repos touched) by porting the relevant artifacts out of templates/l5-toolkit/github/ into the os-eco root .github/ tree, hardening the root .gitignore, and pointing top-level docs at the L5 toolkit. Order is strict: governance files first, then gitignore + labels, then toolkit discoverability, then the milestone seal. The seal commit is the final wrap-up of the whole L5 uplift mission across the ecosystem.

steps.title: Extend root .gitignore and add labels.yml + sync-labels workflow
Make L5 toolkit discoverable from root docs
Finalize for audit: verify governance, request /readiness-report

acceptance: AGENTS.md exists at /Users/jayminwest/Projects/os-eco/AGENTS.md (>2KB) with an Ecosystem section documenting the eight sub-repos and the cross-cutting .seeds/.mulch/.canopy/.plot/ directories.
.github/dependabot.yml exists and declares a weekly github-actions ecosystem with a cooldown block (no npm ecosystem block — root has no package.json).
.github/pull_request_template.md exists at os-eco root with Summary / Changes / Test plan sections.
Root .gitignore preserves the existing sub-repo + .run-plan-logs ignores AND adds .env, .env.* (with !.env.example), .idea/, .vscode/, .DS_Store, *.log.
.github/labels.yml exists with the canonical P0–P3 priority/area/kind/status taxonomy AND .github/workflows/sync-labels.yml exists and mirrors warren's pattern.
README.md or CLAUDE.md at the os-eco root contains a clearly-marked L5 Toolkit section linking to templates/l5-toolkit/README.md.
git status clean on os-eco main after all four children commit; the four feature commits each name the VAL-OS-ECO-* criteria they close in their messages.
The final child's salient handoff instructs the user to run /readiness-report from /Users/jayminwest/Projects/os-eco/ to produce .factory-mission-scratch/os-eco-readiness-report.md.
